sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36583" key="e)caithte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαιτ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n36583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must beg off,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινὰ παρά τινος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0034.tlg001.perseus-grc1:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lycurg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">135</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
